headers.comment: Cross-origin isolation: required for SharedArrayBuffer, which skwasm's multithreaded (--wasm) renderer uses. Without these, the wasm renderer falls back to single-threaded skwasm_heavy. COEP:require-corp means every subresource must be same-origin or send CORP/CORS; the Flutter shell + skwasm assets and the render worker are all same-origin, and PDFs are loaded from the local file picker (not fetched), so this is safe here.
